message:
fix(square): replace manual URL string splitting with proper reqwest::Url parsing

The doctor network_constraints check was splitting base_url on "://" and
"/" to extract the host — fragile and incorrect for URLs with ports or
auth. Replace with reqwest::Url::parse() and check scheme (https), host
(connect.squareup.com), and port (443) independently. Error messages
now specify the exact requirement: https://connect.squareup.com:443.

Also adds doctor test assertions verifying the network_constraints check
passes for properly configured connectors.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
